Name: OpenSSH RCE Exposure
Solution: Upgrade OpenSSH package to fixed version and restart service.

Name: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal
Solution: Update Apache HTTP Server to a patched version and validate configurations.

Name: Outdated PHP Version Detected
Solution: Upgrade PHP to the latest supported version and test application compatibility.

Name: ICMP Timestamp Request Response Enabled
Solution: Disable ICMP timestamp responses on affected hosts to reduce information leakage.

Name: Database Service Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
Solution: Apply vendor patch immediately and restrict database access to trusted sources.

Name: Nginx Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
Solution: Upgrade Nginx to latest stable version and restart service.

Name: MySQL Weak Authentication Configuration
Solution: Enforce strong password policy and restrict remote access.

Name: Windows Kernel Privilege Escalation Flaw
Solution: Apply Microsoft security patch and reboot affected systems.

Name: SSL/TLS Weak Cipher Suites Enabled
Solution: Disable weak cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2 or higher.

Name: Tomcat Directory Listing Enabled
Solution: Disable directory listing and update Apache Tomcat version.

Name: Outdated Python Package Dependency
Solution: Upgrade vulnerable Python libraries to secure versions.

Name: Redis Unauthorized Access Vulnerability
Solution: Enable authentication and restrict Redis access to internal network.

Name: Windows SMB Remote Execution Risk
Solution: Apply SMB security updates and disable SMBv1 protocol.

Name: Insecure Default SNMP Community String
Solution: Change default SNMP community strings and restrict SNMP access.

Name: Docker Container Escape Vulnerability
Solution: Upgrade Docker engine and enforce container isolation policies.
